remaining_params.SpellDescription: Target player mills four cards. (They put the top four cards of their library into their graveyard.)

params.TriggerDescription: Whenever an opponent discards a card or mills one or more cards, put a +1/+1 counter on each Advisor you control.
Whenever an opponent discards a card or mills one or more cards, put a +1/+1 counter on each Advisor you control.
